label: ALEPH-1 lunar payload launch
description: Australian startup Lunaria One launches ALEPH-1 — a payload testing how plants survive the journey to the Moon and endure lunar surface conditions. Australia's first authorised lunar payload.

label: Skykraft air traffic management constellation completes
description: Skykraft plans to complete deployment of its space-enabled global air traffic management satellite network, with coverage of aircraft even in remote areas.

label: Fleet Space SPIDER payload to the Moon
description: Fleet Space Technologies' SPIDER seismic payload launches to the Moon aboard Firefly Aerospace's Blue Ghost Mission 2, supporting future lunar habitation research.

label: Optus-led Australian LEO satellite launches
description: An Optus-led consortium plans to launch a new Australian-made low Earth orbit satellite, carrying payloads including HEO's Adler Imager space telescope.

label: Civil Space Strategy target year
description: End year of Australia's Civil Space Strategy 2019–2028, which set the framework for growing the sector to $12 billion and 20,000 jobs by 2030.

label: Roo-ver lands on the Moon
description: Australia's Roo-ver lunar rover, built by ELO2, travels to the lunar south pole with NASA aboard an Intuitive Machines lander as part of the Artemis program.

label: $12B revenue target
description: Australia's Civil Space Strategy targets tripling the sector's revenue from $4.3B in FY17 to $12B by 2030.

label: 20,000 new jobs target
description: Australia's Civil Space Strategy targets creating 20,000 new direct and indirect space jobs by 2030.
